seo.title: AI Brand Promotion - Promotion Assets and Analytics
seo.description: Use AiToEarn to create and manage draft boxes. Generate videos and image assets in batches with AI, and track views, likes, comments, shares, and other performance metrics in real time.
seo.keywords: brand promotion, AI promotion assets, draft box management, AI video generation, social media promotion, content publishing, marketing analytics, AI marketing tools, brand exposure, offline promotion, AiToEarn

empty.title: No Draft Boxes Yet
empty.description: Create your first draft box to start organizing content

plan.title: Draft Box
plan.emptyDesc: Create your first draft box to start organizing content
plan.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

detail.title: Draft Box Details
detail.description: View and manage your draft box
detail.batchGenerateDesc: Select the number of drafts to generate (1-10)
detail.agentGeneratePrompt: Generate 10 video drafts for my restaurant
detail.promptPlaceholderVideoLimit: Upload up to {{count}} video assets, with total video duration no more than {{duration}} seconds
detail.promptPlaceholderAudioLimit: Upload up to {{count}} audio assets, with total audio duration no more than {{duration}} seconds
detail.promptPlaceholderMentionHint: Type '@' in the prompt to reference uploaded media resources
detail.promptEditorDescription: Edit the prompt in a larger workspace. Save to sync it back to the inline input.
detail.mediaMentionEmpty: You haven't uploaded any resources yet
detail.insufficientBalance: This generation requires {{total}} credits, but you only have {{balance}} credits. Please top up and try again.
detail.draftImagesAddedToReference: Added {{count}} image(s) to the reference files
detail.draftImagesAddedToReferencePartial: Reference file limit reached. Added {{count}} image(s)
detail.draftImagesAlreadyInReference: These images are already in the reference files
detail.videoHintJimeng: (The system will automatically adjust the draft generation style based on your uploaded video)
detail.videoHintGrok: (The system will generate new video based on your uploaded video)
detail.videoNotSupported: Video upload is not supported in image mode
detail.audioNotSupported: The selected model does not support audio upload
detail.referenceMediaCountExceeded: Audio and video inputs can contain up to {{max}} files total
detail.videoFormatUnsupported: The selected model does not support this video format
detail.videoSizeExceeded: Video file size cannot exceed {{max}} MB
detail.videoDurationTooShort: Video duration must be at least {{min}} seconds
detail.videoDurationExceeded: Total video duration cannot exceed {{max}} seconds
detail.audioFormatUnsupported: The selected model does not support this audio format
detail.audioSizeExceeded: Audio file size cannot exceed {{max}} MB
detail.audioDurationTooShort: Audio duration must be at least {{min}} seconds
detail.audioDurationExceeded: Total audio duration cannot exceed {{max}} seconds
detail.audioLoadFailed: Failed to load audio file, please try again
detail.videoLoadFailed: Failed to load video file, please try again
detail.promptRequired: Please enter a prompt before generating
detail.noCommonModelParams: Selected models do not share usable parameters
detail.noPlatformSelected: No target platform selected, no parameter limits applied.
detail.limitsMinTip: Shows the minimum value across all selected platforms.

platformIncompatible.contentTypeNotSupported: This platform does not support the current content type
platformIncompatible.imageCountExceeded: Image count exceeds the platform limit (max {{max}})

detail.timeLimitedModelTip: Time-limited models are not guaranteed to be available. If unavailable, please try again later or switch to another model.
detail.seedanceCreditsEstimateWarning: Credit usage is only an estimate and may vary based on the actual result.
detail.captionPromptPlaceholder: Add higher-priority requirements for the title, description, and topics. These requirements override the default prompt below.
detail.systemCaptionPromptTip: Prompt used to generate the title, description, and topics. Adjust it for the current task.
detail.titleLimitPrompt: Title must be no more than {{max}} characters
detail.descriptionLimitPrompt: Description must be no more than {{max}} characters
detail.titleNoEmojiPrompt: Do not use emoji in the title.
detail.insufficientSeedanceCredits: This Seedance generation is estimated to use {{total}} dedicated credits. Your dedicated balance is {{balance}}, which is not enough. Please recharge and try again.
detail.seedanceCreditsUsageHint: Seedance credits will be used first. Estimated use: {{total}}.
detail.seedanceCreditsInsufficientHint: Not enough Seedance credits. Estimated: {{total}}, current: {{balance}}.

overview.qrcodeHint: Share this QR code so customers or staff can scan and publish drafts with any {{platform}} account.
overview.noDraftQrcodeHint: Add a draft or configure any promotion entrance to use the QR code for promotion.

publishRecord.title: Publish Records
publishRecord.emptyDesc: Publish records will appear here after content is posted.

material.emptyDesc: Create materials or use Agent to batch generate

common.dataUpdateHint: Data is not real-time and updates daily at 2 AM

draftManage.batchDeleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected drafts? This cannot be undone.
draftManage.setConditionHint: Please set at least one filter condition
draftManage.transferDescription: {{count}} item(s) selected. Choose the target draft box.
draftManage.targetPlanPlaceholder: Search and select a draft box
draftManage.transferNoAvailableTarget: No target draft box is available. Create another draft box first.

createMaterial.selectPlanFirst: Please select a draft box first

createMaterial.instagramVideoAspectRatio: Instagram video aspect ratio must be between 9:16 and 4:5
createMaterial.facebookImageAspectRatio: Facebook image aspect ratio must be between 4:5 and 1.91:1
createMaterial.facebookVideoAspectRatio: Facebook video aspect ratio must be between 9:16 and 4:5
createMaterial.platformIssueHint: If this draft does not need to support {{platform}}, you can deselect it from target platforms.

planTab.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this draft box?
